title: Missing MULTIDRIVEN warning for variable with multiple drivers

features.name: variable output port with primitive gate and continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a module with an output port declared as a variable type (bit/logic/reg) that receives drives from both a primitive gate instance output and a continuous assignment
features.snippet: module a(output bit b); or g(b, c, d); assign b = 'b1; endmodule

features.name: primitive gate instance driving module output port
features.description: Code should include a primitive gate instance (or, and, nor, etc.) where the gate output terminal connects directly to a module output port
features.snippet: module a(output bit b); or g(b, c, d); endmodule
